kata — keybindings

Global                        Detail                                     Forms
?         help                tab            next tab                    ctrl+s         save or apply
q/ctrl+c  quit                shift+tab      prev tab                    esc            cancel
P         projects            enter          jump to referenced issue    tab/shift+tab  change field
D         daemons             esc/backspace  back                        ctrl+e         open editor
F         federation          e              edit body                   ctrl+u         clear prompt
L         toggle layout       c              new comment
                              p              set parent                  Filters
Graph                         b              add blocker                 /       search
k       up                    l              add related                 s       cycle status filter
j       down                  +              add label                   f       filter (form)
up      scroll up             -              remove label                c       clear filters
down    scroll down           a              assign owner                ctrl+r  reset filter form
pgup    page up               A              clear owner
pgdown  page down             !              set priority
g       first
G       last                  Children
enter   open detail           N      new child
space   expand/collapse       j/k    move child cursor
right   expand                ↑↓     scroll detail viewport
left    collapse              enter  open child
n       new issue (form)
o       toggle graph order
x       close
r       reopen

press ? to return
